All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Exception Summary Annotation Types Summary 
    Class Description
    BuildConfig  
    DatabaseDecryptException
    A class for decryption exception occurs when it failed to decrypt database.
    DetectedDeviceTimeModifiedException
    A class for time manipulation exception occurs when a change of device time is detected.
    ErrorStatePallyconDrmSession
    Created by PallyCon on 2018-03-05.
    MpdTrackSelector
    parses MPEG-DASH manifest file (MPD file) and modifies it.
    NetworkConnectedException
    A class for network exception which occurs in the following cases:
    PallyConDetectRooting  
    PallyconDownloadException
    A class for PallyconDownloadTask exception which occurs in the following cases:
    PallyconDownloadTask
    asynchronous task that is used for downloading content.
    PallyconDownloadTask.LiveProfileItem  
    PallyconDownloadTask.OnDemandItem  
    PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadCallback
    called by event during file download. downloading files can handled by implementing this callback.
    PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener
    called by event while downloading content
    PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadFinishCallback
    called after the file is downloaded.
    PallyconDrmException
    A class for PallyconWVMSDK object's exception which occurs in the following cases:
    PallyconDrmSession  
    PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager
    Manages provisioning requests.
    PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener
    Callback to be notified when the reference count of this session changes.
    PallyconDrmSession.UnexpectedDrmSessionException
    Thrown when an unexpected exception or error is thrown during provisioning or key requests.
    PallyconDrmSessionManager
    A DrmSessionManager that supports playbacks using ExoMediaDrm.
    PallyconDrmSessionManager.Builder
    Builder for PallyconDrmSessionManager instances.
    PallyconDrmSessionManager.MissingSchemeDataException
    Signals that the Format.drmInitData passed to PallyconDrmSessionManager.acquireSession(android.os.Looper, com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionEventListener.EventDispatcher, com.google.android.exoplayer2.Format) does not contain scheme data for the required UUID.
    PallyconDrmSessionManager.Mode
    Determines the action to be done after a session acquired.
    PallyconEncrypterException
    A class for client authentication exception occurs when the Site ID or Site Key authentication failed.
    PallyconEventListener
    called by event during DRM process.
    PallyconHttpMediaDrmCallback
    Created by PallyconTeam
    PallyconKeyRequest
    Interface to request content key.
    PallyconLoggingListener
    called by a logging event.
    PallyConMpegDashInfo
    Informs the MPEG-DASH Content file size.
    PallyconOfflineLicenseHelperException
    A class for offline license exception occurs when acquiring and deleting licenses before playback.
    PallyconPermissionException
    A class for Android permission error exception occurs when the application does not have Manifest.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission.
    PallyconServerResponseException
    A class for license server communication error exception
    PallyconTokenInfo
    Token string information
    PallyconWVMSDK
    provides APIs needed to initialize Widevine SDK, confirm initialization, delete license, and acquire PallyconDrmSessionManager.
    PallyconWVMSDK.DownloadLicenseResultCallback
    called by event during license download.
    PallyconWVMSDKFactory
    creates PallyconWVMSDK instance which is a singleton
    StringUtil  
    UnAuthorizedDeviceException
    A class for authentication exception occurs when the authentication fails to support Widevine.
